priorityDrivers: DARPA SBIR activity indicates institutional interest
SIGINT defeat potential creates urgent defensive gap
Multi-lab convergence across 3 allied nations
strategicNotes: AmBC demonstrates sustained capability to operate at sub-noise floors using existing ambient RF. Immediate implication: traditional SIGINT will fail to detect these networks. This creates a persistent operational blind spot in highly contested EM environments.
evidenceBase: 24 related academic papers, 3 recent DARPA SBIRs, 1 patent filing by major defense contractor.
bottlenecks: energy harvesting efficiency, miniaturized antenna design

priorityDrivers: Imminent integration into micro-UAS platforms
Current countermeasures obsolete within 18 months
Commercial automotive scale driving rapid cost collapse
Active deployment in 3+ defense programs globally
strategicNotes: Rapid cost reduction and form-factor shrinkage in solid-state LiDAR units point towards imminent integration into attritable, micro-UAS platforms. Current optical-only countermeasures will be insufficient within 18 months.
evidenceBase: Commercial supply chain analysis, widespread automotive adoption, miniaturized prototypes in defense expos.

signal: Hypersonic Glide Body Plasma Sheath Comm
priorityDrivers: Still theoretical — no verified experimental results
Extremely small research community
strategicNotes: Theoretical breakthroughs in utilizing magnetic windows to communicate through the plasma sheath of hypersonic vehicles. If realized, solves the 'blackout' problem, significantly increasing the tactical flexibility of HGV platforms.
evidenceBase: Extremely niche academic publications, unverified claims from rival state-sponsored labs.
bottlenecks: superconducting magnet miniaturization, extreme thermal shielding

signal: Neuromorphic Chip Architectures for Edge AI
priorityDrivers: 100x power efficiency gain over von Neumann for inference
Active NATO integration trials underway
Critical enabler for disconnected edge operations
strategicNotes: Intel Loihi 3 and IBM NorthPole demonstrate 100x power efficiency gains over von Neumann architectures for inference workloads. Immediate defense implication: real-time threat classification on platforms without GPU infrastructure.
evidenceBase: Published benchmarks, active NATO CIED integration trials, 12 defense contractor R&D allocations.
bottlenecks: programming model immaturity, limited training ecosystem

signal: Quantum Key Distribution over Free-Space Optical Links
priorityDrivers: Chinese Micius satellite demonstrated intercontinental QKD
Renders current SIGINT against strategic comms obsolete if operationalized
ESA replication program initiated
strategicNotes: Chinese Micius satellite demonstrated inter-continental QKD. European Space Agency initiated independent replication. If operationalized, current SIGINT infrastructure against strategic communications becomes obsolete.
evidenceBase: State-published experimental results (partially verified), ESA roadmap documents, 3 US DoD research grants.
bottlenecks: atmospheric attenuation, key generation rate limitations, satellite constellation cost

priorityDrivers: 5x thermal dissipation improvement over GaN-on-SiC
Enables next-gen radar and EW systems
Multiple DARPA contracts awarded in last 6 months
strategicNotes: Diamond substrates achieve 5x thermal conductivity versus silicon carbide, enabling power densities previously impossible in compact form factors. Direct implication for next-generation AESA radar modules and high-power EW jammers.
evidenceBase: DARPA THREADS program results, industry partner demonstrations, 8 peer-reviewed papers.
bottlenecks: synthetic diamond wafer cost, epitaxial growth uniformity

priorityDrivers: Long-term strategic significance but near-term improbable
No credible path to militarized compact reactor before 2040
strategicNotes: Multiple startups claim tokamak miniaturization breakthroughs. While eventual fusion propulsion would transform naval power projection, no verifiable experimental results indicate near-term viability. Monitor as long-horizon signal.
evidenceBase: Startup press releases, 2 peer-reviewed plasma physics papers, VC funding announcements.
bottlenecks: plasma confinement stability, materials science for containment vessels
